untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of price deviation >1.5σ from 20-day mean and volume deviation >150% from 20-day average. While vol_ratio_20 exists, there is no standardized sigma-based deviation indicator (would require bb_bandwidth or atr-based calculation). The signal also requires event detection ('announced event that contradicts baseline expectations') which cannot be expressed with available price/volume indicators. Additionally, the 30-minute analysis delay and position sizing logic (75% reduction on anomaly) cannot be encoded in entry/exit conditions alone.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about triggering deliberate analysis (System 2) when anomalies occur. The entry conditions attempt to capture volume spikes and price moves away from the 20-day SMA, but cannot precisely implement the 1.5σ threshold or event-based triggers. A full implementation would require: (1) custom calculation of rolling standard deviation, (2) event data feeds, and (3) position management logic outside the entry/exit rules. Recommend implementing this as a separate anomaly detection module with alerts rather than a traditional entry/exit strategy.
